priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: partial UX degradation — title and price load correctly, no checkout or payment flow blocked, scoped to slow-network users, not all users, 100% reproducible on affected network conditions
severity_justification: While reproducibility is 100% and the impact on Tier 2/3 users is real, this is a partial UX degradation — product title and price load correctly, and no core transaction flow (checkout, payment, search results) is blocked. A workaround exists (users can still tap through to the product page). Similar historical bugs (FLIPPI-2143, FLIPPI-2088) were marked P0, but those appear to be broader image failures not scoped to network-condition edge cases; the network-conditional nature here limits blast radius to users on degraded connections rather than all users.
owner_reason: Aaryak Sanghoi is the assignee on FLIPPI-2143, the closest historical match (broken image icons in a SLAP product context), and also owns FLIPPI-1813 and FLIPPI-1814 covering product-page rendering quality, suggesting ownership of image-rendering issues in product UI components.
